---
title: ""
---
::: columns
::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: center;"}

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.align='center', out.width='80%'}
knitr::include_graphics("images/IMG-4665.jpg")
```

## Najiyah Williamson

:::

::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: left;"}

Add some text here describing yourself. Add a [link](https://google.com) so we can see behavior later. 

:::
